response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ development on Windows platforms, fixed income or capital markets domain expertise, and SQL Server/Oracle database experience — all mandatory requirements for the role. Their work centers on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile systems, with no evidence of financial systems or Windows-based C++ development in the past two decades.
strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience across diverse domains
Strong track record in CI/CD, testing, and developer tooling
Active open-source contributor with technical depth in multiple languages
concerns: No evidence of professional C++ development on Windows platform
Lacks fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure
SQL experience listed but no mention of SQL Server or Oracle in context
